title: TaxJar provider config
description: Configuration shape for a TaxJar integration. Validated by TaxProviderConfigObserver on create + update.

api_token.description: TaxJar API token. Generated in the TaxJar dashboard under Account > API. Encrypted at rest.

environment.description: TaxJar environment. 'sandbox' routes to api.sandbox.taxjar.com (test data, no billing).

nexus_addresses.description: US nexus declarations. Each address enables sales tax calculation for its state under Wayfair economic-nexus rules.

customer_id_prefix.description: Optional prefix for the TaxJar customer_id field. Useful for multi-tenant Stackra accounts sharing a single TaxJar account.

product_tax_code_default.description: Default TaxJar product_tax_code applied when the calculation doesn't specify one. e.g. 20010 for digital goods.

timeout_seconds.description: Per-request HTTP timeout. Shorter than marketing because tax blocks invoice line creation.
